theorem P2_implies_P1 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    P2 (A := A) → P1 (A := A) := by
  intro hA
  dsimp [P2, P1] at hA ⊢
  have h₁ : interior (closure (interior A)) ⊆ closure (interior A) := by
    simpa using Set.interior_subset (s := closure (interior A))
  exact hA.trans h₁

theorem Topology.P2_imp_P1 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    Topology.P2 A → Topology.P1 A := by
  intro h
  dsimp [Topology.P1]
  dsimp [Topology.P2] at h
  exact Set.Subset.trans h (by
    simpa using interior_subset)
